- ARES-7 is an AI unit stationed at the settlement

Generate a realistic surveillance dispatch report. Format it as a live transmission with:
- A dispatch header with timestamp, sector, classification
- 3-5 field observations about hybrid activity, electromagnetic signals, or anomalies
- Each observation has: location, activity type, threat level (LOW/MODERATE/HIGH/CRITICAL), brief description
- End with a SIGNAL ANALYSIS section noting any C.L.A.W. frequency echoes or Voss signatures
- Tone: clinical, military, urgent but controlled
- Reference specific Chicago locations (Michigan Avenue, the Loop, Wacker Drive, LaSalle Street, the lake)
- Occasionally hint at Voss's presence or the Siders' movements
- Keep total length 300-400 words
- Use ALL CAPS for headers and classifications
- Include coordinates like [41.8827\xB0 N, 87.6233\xB0 W]
